title: TurboDiffusion(Nvidia GPU)
tagline: An accelerated video generation framework that speeds up end-to-end diffusion while preserving video quality
description:
TurboDiffusion is an accelerated text-to-video generation framework based on the Latent Consistency Model (LCM). It leverages various TurboWan2 models to rapidly generate high-quality videos from text descriptions. The framework supports both image and video generation and provides optimised checkpoints for different GPU configurations.

**Key Features:**
- Ultra-fast video and image generation
- Intuitive Gradio WebUI
- Optimised for different GPU configurations
- Quantised and unquantised checkpoints
- Flexible model configuration

**Hardware Requirements:**
- Recommended: RTX 3090 or above
- GPU VRAM: > 30 GB
- System RAM: > 40 GB
- CUDA-compatible NVIDIA drivers

**Learn More:**
- [TurboDiffusion GitHub](https://github.com/thu-ml/TurboDiffusion)

tips.before_install:
Built-in model: TurboWan2.1-T2V-1.3B-480P

1. Officially supported model list (TurboDiffusion official HF org)
Text-to-Video (T2V)
- [TurboDiffusion/TurboWan2.1-T2V-1.3B-480P](https://huggingface.co/TurboDiffusion/TurboWan2.1-T2V-1.3B-480P)
- [TurboDiffusion/TurboWan2.1-T2V-14B-480P](https://huggingface.co/TurboDiffusion/TurboWan2.1-T2V-14B-480P)
- [TurboDiffusion/TurboWan2.1-T2V-14B-720P](https://huggingface.co/TurboDiffusion/TurboWan2.1-T2V-14B-720P)
Image-to-Video (I2V)
- [TurboDiffusion/TurboWan2.2-I2V-A14B-720P](https://huggingface.co/TurboDiffusion/TurboWan2.2-I2V-A14B-720P)

2. Install hf download (Hugging Face CLI) (Run in terminal)

- Method A (Recommended): Official one-click installation script
`curl -LsSf https://hf.co/cli/install.sh | bash`

- Method B: pip install (suitable for existing Python environments)
`pip install -U huggingface_hub`

- Verify after installation:
`hf --help`

3.  Download specific model weights to a fixed directory (Recommended command template)        

Template:
`hf download <repo_id> <filename> --local-dir /DATA/AppData/turbodiffusion_nvidia/models`
Example: Download 14B 720P quant weights (adjust based on actual filename in repo)
`hf download TurboDiffusion/TurboWan2.1-T2V-14B-720P TurboWan2.1-T2V-14B-720P-quant.pth  --local-dir /DATA/AppData/turbodiffusion_nvidia/models`

4. How to apply after download is complete
- Confirm weights file is at: `/DATA/AppData/turbodiffusion_nvidia/models`
- Refresh the model list in the WebUI, click discover model / refresh model list
